prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a directional neutral streak with an ivory-white core, silver pearl shell, and a soft champagne edge, like a clean wind-sheen or refined slash trail. Keep the subject compact and readable, with elegant motion and no heavy smoke or beam clutter. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no oversized smoke cloud, no beam wall, no saturated elemental colors
notes: Directional support streak with a polished neutral motion read.
